account.about_description: Kasero is a multi-business management system for small businesses -- food vendors, artisans, retailers. Built for speed, simplicity, and offline capability.
account.support_coming_soon_description: In-app support is on the way. For now, please reach out to the business owner who invited you, or check back in a future update.
account.delete_blocked_description: You cannot delete your account while you own businesses. Transfer ownership or delete each one first.
account.delete_blocked_owned_label: {count, plural, one {# business} other {# businesses}} owned by you:
account.delete_warning_description: Deleting your account will permanently remove your profile, your memberships in any businesses you joined, and any pending invitations or transfers tied to you. You will be signed out and redirected to the registration page.
account.theme_description_system: Automatically adjusts based on your device
account.theme_hero_subtitle: Pick the lighting that suits the room you're working in.
account.profile_hero_subtitle: Your name and photo show up across every business you join.
account.password_hero_subtitle: A short fresh phrase, used nowhere else, kept private.
account.support_body: In-app support is in the workshop. Until then, the door is still open.
account.support_footnote: Reach out to the business owner who invited you. They can adjust your role, fix a mistake, or remove you from the team.
account.delete_hero_subtitle: This empties the drawer for good. Read the receipts below before signing.
account.delete_warning_item_memberships: Every business you've joined will lose you as a member
